chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 10 of 2018 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 23.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Hingorjo, advocate for petitioners Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. along with SIP ASI Muhammad Shafiq PS Mangli district Sanghar & Insp. Muhammad Nadeem Arain SHO Sanghar Learned Asst. A.G. has filed comments of respondent Nos. 2, 3 & 4 which are taken on record. Through this petition, the petitioners have sought legal protection. Learned A.A.G. is present and states that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and shall provide the same protection to the petitioners as is available to other citizen of country. In view of statement of learned A.A.G. the present petition is disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
